description: §48.3.5 clean neg — the SAME body as `fn/async-decl-reject` but declared as a plain synchronous `fn loadProfile(id)` (no `async`) SHALL NOT fire E-FN-005. Confirms E-FN-005 keys on the `async` modifier / `await`, not on the declaration itself. `notCodes` asserts E-FN-005 stays silent.
rationale: §48.3.5 fires on an `async` `fn` declaration or an `await` in the body; a sync `fn` with neither is the canonical form and is silent.
